title: Further extension of last date of completion of Mandatory Courses and Comprehensive Assessment on iGOT Karmayogi platform for the year 2025-26 – reg.

Consolidate Standard terms and conditions for appointment of Non-Official as Chariman/Charipersons a nd Deputy/Vice Chairman/Chairpersons in the Bodies other than Public Sector Undertaking Statutory Commissions and Constitutional Bodies of Haryana.
